text.title: Multimodal VUI Design Spec Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the multimodal-vui-design methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-tasks-and-modalities
step.action: List tasks; map each to primary + secondary modality + haptic cue.

step.name: set-recognition-error-budget
step.action: Set WER threshold; design recovery ladder (retry / confirm / fall-back to visual).
step.decision-gate: If WER target unreachable on target language, restrict feature scope.

step.name: design-voice-persona
step.action: Define persona constraints; sample TTS in 5 sentences; brand sign-off.

step.name: a11y-and-multilingual-review
step.action: Check screen-reader compatibility of supporting visuals; check multilingual coverage.
